_readme:
This file holds ALL text shown on the site. Edit the values, not the keys. Every entry has an English (en) and Chinese (zh) version — keep both filled in. You can use simple HTML inside the text:
is a line break, … is bold, & is the & symbol, … is superscript. Don't rename keys or remove commas/quotes/brackets. After editing, save and redeploy.

metaDescription.en: Josephine Shen — research, facilitation and strategy across AI, security, and the state.
metaDescription.zh: 沈菲菲——横跨人工智能、安全与国家的研究、协调与战略。

role.en:
Research, facilitation & strategy across AI, security & the state.
A practice for the institutions, communities and companies shaping how advanced AI meets the public good.
role.zh:
横跨人工智能、安全与国家的研究、协调与战略。
为塑造先进人工智能如何服务公共利益的机构、社区与企业而工作。

about_lede.en: Research, facilitation and strategy for the institutions, communities and companies shaping how advanced AI meets the public good.
about_lede.zh: 为塑造先进人工智能如何服务公共利益的机构、社区与企业，提供研究、协调与战略支持。

about_p1.en: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
about_p1.zh: 占位文本。此处将替换为该领域工作的真实摘录，用以呈现其政策与研究写作的风格、结构与论证方式，供读者参考与评估。

about_p2.en: Embedded across the seams between sectors, the work facilitates the emergence of new systems for AI, security and society — translating between the people who build capability, the bodies that govern it, and the communities who live with its consequences.
about_p2.zh: 在各部门的接缝之间展开工作，促成人工智能、安全与社会新系统的形成——在构建能力的人、治理能力的机构，以及承受其后果的社区之间进行转译。

about_sub.en: Practice — Researcher / Facilitator / Strategist / Libertine / Provocateur / Arsonist. Based in Berlin. Working across English & 中文.
about_sub.zh: 实践 — 研究者 / 促进者 / 战略家 / 风流者 / 煽动者 / 纵火者。常驻柏林。工作语言：English & 中文。

contact_sub.en: For collaborations, briefings, convenings, or correspondence.  —  linkedin.com/in/josephinesb
contact_sub.zh: 合作、简报、召集或来函，欢迎联系。  —  linkedin.com/in/josephinesb
